decorators:
pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "js,result",
    [
        ("{}", True),
        ("{a:1}", True),
        ("[]", False),
        ("[1]", True),
        ("new Map()", False),
        ("new Map([[0, 0]])", True),
        ("new Set()", False),
        ("new Set([0])", True),
        ("class T {}", True),
        ("new (class T {})", True),
        ("new Uint8Array(0)", False),
        ("new Uint8Array(1)", True),
        ("new ArrayBuffer(0)", False),
        ("new ArrayBuffer(1)", True),
    ],
)
name: test_jsproxy_bool

decorators:
pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "js,result",
    [
        ("document.createElement('div')", True),
        ("document.createElement('select')", True),
        ("document.createElement('p')", True),
        ("document.createElement('style')", True),
        ("document.createElement('ul')", True),
        ("document.createElement('ul').style", True),
        ("document.querySelectorAll('x')", False),
        ("document.querySelectorAll('body')", True),
        ("document.all", False),
    ],
)
name: test_jsproxy_bool_html

decorators:
pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "sequence_converter",
    [
        "(x) => x",
        "(x) => new Uint8Array(x)",
        "(x) => Object.create({[Symbol.toStringTag] : 'NodeList'}, Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(x))",
    ],
)
name: test_array_sequence_methods

decorators: pytest.mark.xfail_browsers(node="Loading urls in node seems to time out right now")
name: test_load_from_url

name: test_load_package_return_from_url

name: test_js_stackframes

name: test_relative_index_url

name: test_index_url_calculation_source_map

decorators: pytest.mark.xfail_browsers(chrome="Node only", firefox="Node only", safari="Node only")

pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "filename, import_stmt",
    [
        ("index.js", "const { loadPyodide } = require('%s/pyodide.js')"),  # commonjs
        ("index.mjs", "import { loadPyodide } from '%s/pyodide.mjs'"),  # esm
    ],
)
name: test_default_index_url_calculation_node
test_csp

pytest.mark.xfail_browsers(
    node="XMLHttpRequest is not available in node",
    safari="raises TypeError: exceptions must derive from BaseException",
)
name: test_pyfetch_cors_error

decorators: pytest.mark.xfail(reason="Requires wasm replacement for stub trampolines")
name: test_cpp_exceptions_and_syncify

decorators:
pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "py,js",
    [
        (None, "undefined"),
        (True, "true"),
        (False, "false"),
        (42, "42"),
        (3.14, "3.14"),
        # Need to test all three internal string representations in Python:
        # UCS1, UCS2 and UCS4
        ("ascii", "'ascii'"),
        ("ιωδιούχο", "'ιωδιούχο'"),
        ("碘化物", "'碘化物'"),
        ("🐍", "'🐍'"),
    ],
)
name: test_python2js1

decorators:
pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "jsval, is_truthy",
    [
        ("()=>{}", True),
        ("new Map()", False),
        ("new Map([[0, 1]])", True),
        ("new Set()", False),
        ("new Set([0])", True),
    ],
)
name: test_js2python_bool

decorators:
pytest.mark.parametrize(
    "obj, msg",
    [
        ("Map([[[1,1], 2]])", "Cannot use key of type Array as a key to a Python dict"),
        ("Set([[1,1]])", "Cannot use key of type Array as a key to a Python set"),
        ("Map([[0, 2], [false, 3]])", "contains both 0 and false"),
        ("Set([0, false])", "contains both 0 and false"),
        ("Map([[1, 2], [true, 3]])", "contains both 1 and true"),
        ("Set([1, true])", "contains both 1 and true"),
    ],
)
name: test_to_py4

decorators: pytest.mark.xfail(reason="Works locally but failing in test suite as of #2022.")
name: test_webloop_exception_handler

decorators: pytest.mark.xfail_browsers(safari="Safari uses setTimeout as a fallback for 0ms delay")
name: test_webworker_zero_timeout2
